ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "item_title" TEXT /* Title of the publication item */,
  "publication_title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "book_series_title" TEXT /* Title of the book series */,
  "journal_volume" INTEGER /* Volume number of the journal */,
  "journal_issue" INTEGER /* Issue number of the journal */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "publication_year" INTEGER /* Year the publication was published */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the publication */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., chapter, article) */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for the publication */,
  "citations" INTEGER /* Number of citations for the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_journal_volume FOREIGN KEY ("journal_volume") REFERENCES journals ("journal_volume"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_book_series_title FOREIGN KEY ("book_series_title") REFERENCES book_series ("book_series_title")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institutional affiliation of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "author_publications" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "author_order" INTEGER /* Order of the author in the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id", "publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_series" (
  "book_series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book series */,
  "book_series_title" TEXT /* Title of the book series */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the book series */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN of the book series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal */,
  "journal_volume" INTEGER /* Volume number of the journal */,
  "journal_issue" INTEGER /* Issue number of the journal */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the journal */,
  "issn" TEXT /* ISSN of the journal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, author, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institutional affiliation of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the publication */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the research team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_memberships" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the research team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_category_links" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "reference_text" TEXT /* Text of the reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_references_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "recommended_by" TEXT /* User who recommended the publication */,
  "recommendation_text" TEXT /* Text of the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)
column_names: Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication
Number of citations for the publication
Order of the author in the publication
Unique identifier for each book series
Role of the user (e.g., researcher, author, admin)
Unique identifier for each access event
ID of the publication being accessed
ID of the user accessing the publication
Date when the publication was accessed
Unique identifier for each research team
Role of the user in the research team
